<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
  <meta charset="utf-8">
  <title>Bundled Page</title>
  <style>
    * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
    body { background: #120b08; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 100vh; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; }
    #__bundler_loading { position: fixed; bottom: 20px; right: 20px; font: 13px/1.4 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; color: #666; background: #fff; padding: 8px 14px; border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.12); z-index: 10000; }
    #__bundler_thumbnail { position: fixed; inset: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #120b08; z-index: 9999; }
    #__bundler_thumbnail svg { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: contain; }
    #__bundler_placeholder { color: #999; font-size: 14px; }
  </style>
  <noscript>
    <style>#__bundler_loading { display: none; }</style>
    <div style="position:fixed;bottom:12px;left:12px;font:13px/1.4 -apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,sans-serif;color:#999;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.9);padding:6px 12px;border-radius:6px;box-shadow:0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);z-index:10000;">
      This page requires JavaScript to display.
    </div>
  </noscript>
</head>
<body>
  <div id="__bundler_thumbnail">
<svg viewBox="0 0 1200 800" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<rect width="1200" height="800" fill="#120b08"></rect>
<circle cx="600" cy="430" r="150" fill="#e2a044"></circle>
<rect x="0" y="500" width="1200" height="300" fill="#3a1d0f"></rect>
<circle cx="480" cy="520" r="48" fill="#1c0e07" stroke="#e79a44" stroke-width="10"></circle>
<circle cx="720" cy="520" r="48" fill="#1c0e07" stroke="#e79a44" stroke-width="10"></circle>
<path d="M480 520 L560 440 L660 440 L720 520" fill="none" stroke="#d9542e" stroke-width="18" stroke-linecap="round"></path>
<text x="600" y="330" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="120" font-weight="bold" fill="#f4e6cf" text-anchor="middle">JOE</text>
</svg>
</div>
  <div id="__bundler_loading">Unpacking...</div>

  <script>
    
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', async function() {
  const loading = document.getElementById('__bundler_loading');
  function setStatus(msg) { if (loading) loading.textContent = msg; }

  // Error sink persists across replaceWith since it's on window, not the DOM.
  window.addEventListener('error', function(e) {
    var p = document.body || document.documentElement;
    var d = document.getElementById('__bundler_err') || p.appendChild(document.createElement('div'));
    d.id = '__bundler_err';
    d.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;bottom:12px;left:12px;right:12px;font:12px/1.4 ui-monospace,monospace;background:#2a1215;color:#ff8a80;padding:10px 14px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid #5c2b2e;z-index:99999;white-space:pre-wrap;max-height:40vh;overflow:auto';
    d.textContent = (d.textContent ? d.textContent + String.fromCharCode(10) : '') +
      '[bundle] ' + (e.message || e.type) +
      (e.filename ? ' (' + e.filename.slice(0, 60) + ':' + e.lineno + ')' : '');
  }, true);

  try {
    const manifestEl = document.querySelector('script[type="__bundler/manifest"]');
    const templateEl = document.querySelector('script[type="__bundler/template"]');
    if (!manifestEl || !templateEl) {
      setStatus('Error: missing bundle data');
      console.error('[bundler] Missing script tags — manifestEl:', !!manifestEl, 'templateEl:', !!templateEl);
      return;
    }

    const manifest = JSON.parse(manifestEl.textContent);
    let template = JSON.parse(templateEl.textContent);

    const uuids = Object.keys(manifest);
    setStatus('Unpacking ' + uuids.length + ' assets...');

    const blobUrls = {};
    await Promise.all(uuids.map(async (uuid) => {
      const entry = manifest[uuid];
      try {
        const binaryStr = atob(entry.data);
        const bytes = new Uint8Array(binaryStr.length);
        for (let i = 0; i < binaryStr.length; i++) bytes[i] = binaryStr.charCodeAt(i);

        let finalBytes = bytes;
        if (entry.compressed) {
          if (typeof DecompressionStream !== 'undefined') {
            const ds = new DecompressionStream('gzip');
            const writer = ds.writable.getWriter();
            const reader = ds.readable.getReader();
            writer.write(bytes);
            writer.close();
            const chunks = [];
            let totalLen = 0;
            while (true) {
              const { done, value } = await reader.read();
              if (done) break;
              chunks.push(value);
              totalLen += value.length;
            }
            finalBytes = new Uint8Array(totalLen);
            let offset = 0;
            for (const chunk of chunks) { finalBytes.set(chunk, offset); offset += chunk.length; }
          } else {
            console.warn('DecompressionStream not available, asset ' + uuid + ' may not render');
          }
        }

        blobUrls[uuid] = URL.createObjectURL(new Blob([finalBytes], { type: entry.mime }));
      } catch (err) {
        console.error('Failed to decode asset ' + uuid + ':', err);
        blobUrls[uuid] = URL.createObjectURL(new Blob([], { type: entry.mime }));
      }
    }));

    const extResEl = document.querySelector('script[type="__bundler/ext_resources"]');
    const extResources = extResEl ? JSON.parse(extResEl.textContent) : [];
    const resourceMap = {};
    for (const entry of extResources) {
      if (blobUrls[entry.uuid]) resourceMap[entry.id] = blobUrls[entry.uuid];
    }

    setStatus('Rendering...');
    for (const uuid of uuids) template = template.split(uuid).join(blobUrls[uuid]);

    // Strip integrity + crossorigin — blob URLs from a file:// document inherit
    // a null origin, so crossorigin forces a CORS fetch that SRI then rejects.
    // The manifest bytes are ours; SRI protects against CDN compromise, not this.
    template = template.replace(/\s+integrity="[^"]*"/gi, '').replace(/\s+crossorigin="[^"]*"/gi, '');

    const resourceScript = '<script>window.__resources = ' +
      JSON.stringify(resourceMap).split('</' + 'script>').join('<\\/' + 'script>') +
      ';</' + 'script>';
    // Inject after <head> so the DOCTYPE stays first; prepending the script
    // would push the parser into quirks mode. DOMParser always emits a <head>
    // (synthesizing one if the source HTML omitted it) but may carry
    // attributes through, so match the full opening tag. slice() rather than
    // replace() keeps us clear of $-pattern substitution in resourceScript.
    const headOpen = template.match(/<head[^>]*>/i);
    if (headOpen) {
      const i = headOpen.index + headOpen[0].length;
      template = template.slice(0, i) + resourceScript + template.slice(i);
    }

    // Parse the template and swap the root element. Scripts inserted via
    // DOMParser/replaceWith are inert per spec — re-create each with
    // createElement so they execute, awaiting onload for src scripts to
    // preserve ordering (React before ReactDOM before Babel before text/babel).
    const doc = new DOMParser().parseFromString(template, 'text/html');
    document.documentElement.replaceWith(doc.documentElement);
    const dead = Array.from(document.scripts);
    for (const old of dead) {
      const s = document.createElement('script');
      for (const a of old.attributes) s.setAttribute(a.name, a.value);
      s.textContent = old.textContent;
      // text/babel scripts with a src: fetch and inline. transformScriptTags
      // does XHR against the src, but blob:null/ from a file:// origin is
      // silently dropped. Inlining makes it a plain inline babel script,
      // which transformScriptTags handles unconditionally.
      if ((s.type === 'text/babel' || s.type === 'text/jsx') && s.src) {
        const r = await fetch(s.src);
        s.textContent = await r.text();
        s.removeAttribute('src');
      }
      const p = s.src ? new Promise(function(r) { s.onload = s.onerror = r; }) : null;
      old.replaceWith(s);
      if (p) await p;
    }
    // Babel standalone auto-transforms type=text/babel on DOMContentLoaded,
    // which fired before we swapped the document. Trigger manually if present.
    if (window.Babel && typeof window.Babel.transformScriptTags === 'function') {
      window.Babel.transformScriptTags();
    }
  } catch (err) {
    setStatus('Error unpacking: ' + err.message);
    console.error('Bundle unpack error:', err);
  }
});

  </script>

U+0329, U+2000-206F, U+20AC, U+2122, U+2191, U+2193, U+2212, U+2215, U+FEFF, U+FFFD;\n}\n<\u002Fstyle>\n<style>\n  *{ box-sizing:border-box; margin:0; padding:0; }\n  html,body{ width:100%; height:100%; background:#120b08; overflow:hidden; }\n  @keyframes mmflick{ 0%,100%{opacity:.06} 50%{opacity:.11} }\n  @keyframes mmpop{ 0%{ transform:translate(-50%,0) scale(.7); opacity:0 } 12%{ opacity:1 } 22%{ transform:translate(-50%,-14px) scale(1.08) } 100%{ transform:translate(-50%,-56px) scale(1); opacity:0 } }\n  @keyframes mmblink{ 0%,100%{opacity:1} 50%{opacity:.15} }\n<\u002Fstyle>\n<\u002Fhelmet>\n<div ref=\"{{ containerRef }}\" oncontextmenu=\"{{ noCtx }}\" style=\"position:absolute; inset:0; width:100%; height:100%; background:#120b08; overflow:hidden; font-family:'Oswald',sans-serif; user-select:none; -webkit-user-select:none; touch-action:none; cursor:default;\">\n\n  <canvas style=\"position:absolute; inset:0; width:100%; height:100%; display:block;\"><\u002Fcanvas>\n\n  <!-- grain / scanline / vignette -->\n  <sc-if value=\"{{ grain }}\" hint-placeholder-val=\"{{ true }}\">\n    <div style=\"position:absolute; inset:0; pointer-events:none; mix-blend-mode:overlay; opacity:.09; animation:mmflick 3.4s steps(2) infinite; background-image:url('data:image/svg+xml;utf8,&lt;svg xmlns=%22http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%22 width=%22120%22 height=%22120%22&gt;&lt;filter id=%22n%22&gt;&lt;feTurbulence type=%22fractalNoise%22 baseFrequency=%220.85%22 numOctaves=%222%22 stitchTiles=%22stitch%22/&gt;&lt;/filter&gt;&lt;rect width=%22100%25%22 height=%22100%25%22 filter=%22url(%23n)%22/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;');\"><\u002Fdiv>\n  <\u002Fsc-if>\n  <div style=\"position:absolute; inset:0; pointer-events:none; opacity:.5; background:repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, rgba(0,0,0,0) 0px, rgba(0,0,0,0) 2px, rgba(0,0,0,.16) 3px, rgba(0,0,0,0) 4px);\"><\u002Fdiv>\n  <div style=\"position:absolute; inset:0; pointer-events:none; background:radial-gradient(120% 120% at 50% 38%, rgba(0,0,0,0) 42%, rgba(20,7,3,.55) 100%);\"><\u002Fdiv>\n\n  <!-- HUD -->\n  <div data-hud=\"wrap\" style=\"position:absolute; inset:0; pointer-events:none; opacity:0; transition:opacity .3s;\">\n    <div style=\"position:absolute; top:22px; left:26px; display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:2px;\">\n      <div style=\"font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:11px; letter-spacing:.32em; color:#e8a94a; text-transform:uppercase;\">SCORE<\u002Fdiv>\n      <div data-hud=\"score\" style=\"font-family:'Anton',sans-serif; font-size:44px; line-height:.9; color:#f4e6cf; text-shadow:0 3px 0 rgba(0,0,0,.5), 0 0 24px rgba(232,169,74,.35);\">0<\u002Fdiv>\n      <div data-hud=\"lives\" style=\"font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:15px; letter-spacing:.34em; color:#d9542e; margin-top:4px;\">▲▲▲<\u002Fdiv>\n      <div data-hud=\"combo\" style=\"font-family:'Oswald'; font-weight:700; font-size:18px; letter-spacing:.06em; color:#d9542e; opacity:0; margin-top:2px;\">COMBO ×1<\u002Fdiv>\n    <\u002Fdiv>\n    <div style=\"position:absolute; top:22px; right:26px; display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:flex-end; gap:6px;\">\n      <div style=\"display:flex; align-items:baseline; gap:8px;\">\n        <div data-hud=\"speed\" style=\"font-family:'Anton',sans-serif; font-size:40px; line-height:.9; color:#f4e6cf;\">0<\u002Fdiv>\n        <div style=\"font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:11px; letter-spacing:.2em; color:#c9752b;\">KM/H<\u002Fdiv>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n      <div style=\"display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px; font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:12px; letter-spacing:.14em; color:#caa27a;\">\n        <span data-hud=\"dist\">0 M<\u002Fspan>\n        <span style=\"opacity:.4;\">/<\u002Fspan>\n        <span data-hud=\"lvl\">砂漠 01<\u002Fspan>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n      <div data-hud=\"prog\" style=\"width:150px; height:5px; background:rgba(0,0,0,.45); border:1px solid rgba(232,169,74,.4);\">\n        <div data-hud=\"progfill\" style=\"height:100%; width:0%; background:linear-gradient(90deg,#c9752b,#e8a94a);\"><\u002Fdiv>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n    <\u002Fdiv>\n    <button onclick=\"{{ onPause }}\" style=\"position:absolute; top:22px; left:50%; transform:translateX(-50%); pointer-events:auto; cursor:pointer; touch-action:manipulation; -webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent; border:2px solid rgba(232,169,74,.5); background:rgba(30,14,7,.5); color:#e8a94a; font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:13px; letter-spacing:.2em; padding:8px 18px;\">❚❚ PAUSE<\u002Fbutton>\n    <div data-hud=\"trick\" style=\"position:absolute; top:30%; left:50%; transform:translate(-50%,0); opacity:0; font-family:'Anton',sans-serif; font-size:46px; letter-spacing:.02em; color:#ffd27a; text-shadow:0 3px 0 rgba(120,20,10,.6), 0 0 30px rgba(255,120,40,.6); white-space:nowrap;\"><\u002Fdiv>\n  <\u002Fdiv>\n\n  <!-- on-screen controls -->\n  <div data-hud=\"pads\" style=\"position:absolute; bottom:26px; left:0; right:0; display:flex; justify-content:space-between; padding:0 26px; pointer-events:none; opacity:0; transition:opacity .3s;\">\n    <button onpointerdown=\"{{ brakeDown }}\" onpointerup=\"{{ brakeUp }}\" onpointerleave=\"{{ brakeUp }}\" onpointercancel=\"{{ brakeUp }}\" oncontextmenu=\"{{ noCtx }}\" style=\"pointer-events:auto; touch-action:none; -webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent; -webkit-user-select:none; width:112px; height:92px; border:2px solid rgba(232,169,74,.55); background:rgba(30,14,7,.5); backdrop-filter:blur(2px); color:#e8a94a; font-family:'Anton',sans-serif; font-size:15px; letter-spacing:.12em; cursor:pointer; display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:4px;\"><span style=\"font-size:30px; line-height:1;\">◄<\u002Fspan>FREIN<\u002Fbutton>\n    <button onpointerdown=\"{{ gasDown }}\" onpointerup=\"{{ gasUp }}\" onpointerleave=\"{{ gasUp }}\" onpointercancel=\"{{ gasUp }}\" oncontextmenu=\"{{ noCtx }}\" style=\"pointer-events:auto; touch-action:none; -webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent; -webkit-user-select:none; width:112px; height:92px; border:2px solid rgba(217,84,46,.7); background:rgba(217,84,46,.16); backdrop-filter:blur(2px); color:#ff9a5a; font-family:'Anton',sans-serif; font-size:15px; letter-spacing:.12em; cursor:pointer; display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:4px;\"><span style=\"font-size:30px; line-height:1;\">►<\u002Fspan>GAZ<\u002Fbutton>\n  <\u002Fdiv>\n\n  <!-- START overlay -->\n  <sc-if value=\"{{ isStart }}\" hint-placeholder-val=\"{{ true }}\">\n    <div style=\"position:absolute; inset:0; display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; justify-content:center; text-align:center; background:radial-gradient(120% 90% at 50% 45%, rgba(18,7,3,.35), rgba(18,7,3,.82)); padding:24px; overflow:auto;\">\n      <div style=\"font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:13px; letter-spacing:.5em; color:#d9542e; text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:10px;\">砂漠 ・ WASTELAND RIDER<\u002Fdiv>\n      <div style=\"font-family:'Anton',sans-serif; font-size:min(20vw,170px); line-height:.82; color:#f4e6cf; letter-spacing:.03em; text-shadow:0 6px 0 rgba(120,20,10,.55), 0 0 60px rgba(232,169,74,.4);\">{{ gameTitle }}<\u002Fdiv>\n      <div style=\"width:min(560px,80vw); height:2px; background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,#c9752b,transparent); margin:20px 0 14px;\"><\u002Fdiv>\n      <div style=\"display:flex; gap:26px; flex-wrap:wrap; justify-content:center; font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:13px; letter-spacing:.14em; color:#caa27a; margin-bottom:22px;\">\n        <span><b style=\"color:#ff9a5a;\">►<\u002Fb> GAZ &nbsp;/&nbsp; nez en l'air<\u002Fspan>\n        <span><b style=\"color:#e8a94a;\">◄<\u002Fb> FREIN &nbsp;/&nbsp; nez en avant<\u002Fspan>\n        <span style=\"color:#8f6f52;\">flips + wheelie = combo<\u002Fspan>\n        <span style=\"color:#8f6f52;\"><b style=\"color:#e8a94a;\">R<\u002Fb> = reset partie<\u002Fspan>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n      <div style=\"display:flex; align-items:center; gap:12px; margin-bottom:22px;\">\n        <div style=\"font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:11px; letter-spacing:.3em; color:#8f6f52;\">PILOTE<\u002Fdiv>\n        <button onclick=\"{{ onPersoM }}\" style=\"pointer-events:auto; cursor:pointer; touch-action:manipulation; -webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent; border:2px solid {{ persoMBorder }}; background:rgba(30,14,7,.5); color:{{ persoMColor }}; font-family:'Anton',sans-serif; font-size:17px; letter-spacing:.12em; padding:10px 26px;\">JOE<\u002Fbutton>\n        <button onclick=\"{{ onPersoF }}\" style=\"pointer-events:auto; cursor:pointer; touch-action:manipulation; -webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent; border:2px solid {{ persoFBorder }}; background:rgba(30,14,7,.5); color:{{ persoFColor }}; font-family:'Anton',sans-serif; font-size:17px; letter-spacing:.12em; padding:10px 26px;\">LOU<\u002Fbutton>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n      <button onclick=\"{{ onNewGame }}\" style=\"pointer-events:auto; cursor:pointer; touch-action:manipulation; -webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent; border:2px solid #d9542e; background:#d9542e; color:#1a0c06; font-family:'Anton',sans-serif; font-size:26px; letter-spacing:.14em; padding:16px 52px; box-shadow:0 0 0 4px rgba(217,84,46,.18), 0 8px 30px rgba(217,84,46,.4); animation:mmblink 1.6s ease-in-out infinite;\">DÉMARRER<\u002Fbutton>\n      <div style=\"margin-top:14px; font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:12px; letter-spacing:.24em; color:#d9542e;\">MODE ARCADE ・ 3 VIES ▲▲▲<\u002Fdiv>\n      <sc-if value=\"{{ hasScores }}\" hint-placeholder-val=\"{{ false }}\">\n        <div style=\"margin-top:20px; display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:5px; min-width:250px;\">\n          <div style=\"font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:11px; letter-spacing:.42em; color:#e8a94a; margin-bottom:2px;\">TOP 5<\u002Fdiv>\n          <sc-for list=\"{{ top5 }}\" as=\"e\" hint-placeholder-count=\"0\">\n            <div style=\"display:flex; justify-content:space-between; gap:34px; font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:14px; color:#caa27a;\"><span>{{ e.rank }}. {{ e.name }}<\u002Fspan><span style=\"color:#ffd27a;\">{{ e.score }}<\u002Fspan><\u002Fdiv>\n          <\u002Fsc-for>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n      <\u002Fsc-if>\n    <\u002Fdiv>\n  <\u002Fsc-if>\n\n  <!-- PAUSE overlay -->\n  <sc-if value=\"{{ isPaused }}\" hint-placeholder-val=\"{{ false }}\">\n    <div style=\"position:absolute; inset:0; display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; justify-content:center; text-align:center; background:radial-gradient(120% 90% at 50% 45%, rgba(18,7,3,.55), rgba(18,7,3,.88)); padding:24px;\">\n      <div style=\"font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:13px; letter-spacing:.5em; color:#e8a94a; text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:10px;\">一時停止<\u002Fdiv>\n      <div style=\"font-family:'Anton',sans-serif; font-size:min(16vw,120px); line-height:.82; color:#f4e6cf; letter-spacing:.04em; text-shadow:0 6px 0 rgba(120,20,10,.55);\">PAUSE<\u002Fdiv>\n      <div style=\"display:flex; gap:18px; flex-wrap:wrap; justify-content:center; margin-top:34px;\">\n        <button onclick=\"{{ onResume }}\" style=\"pointer-events:auto; cursor:pointer; touch-action:manipulation; -webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent; border:2px solid #7ec96a; background:#7ec96a; color:#132009; font-family:'Anton',sans-serif; font-size:22px; letter-spacing:.14em; padding:14px 44px;\">REPRENDRE<\u002Fbutton>\n        <button onclick=\"{{ onMenu }}\" style=\"pointer-events:auto; cursor:pointer; touch-action:manipulation; -webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent; border:2px solid #e8a94a; background:transparent; color:#e8a94a; font-family:'Anton',sans-serif; font-size:22px; letter-spacing:.14em; padding:14px 44px;\">MENU<\u002Fbutton>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n      <div style=\"margin-top:18px; font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:12px; letter-spacing:.2em; color:#8f6f52;\">ÉCHAP / P<\u002Fdiv>\n    <\u002Fdiv>\n  <\u002Fsc-if>\n\n  <!-- CRASH overlay (life lost, lives remaining) -->\n  <sc-if value=\"{{ isCrashed }}\" hint-placeholder-val=\"{{ false }}\">\n    <div style=\"position:absolute; inset:0; display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; justify-content:center; text-align:center; background:radial-gradient(120% 90% at 50% 45%, rgba(60,10,6,.42), rgba(14,5,3,.9)); padding:24px;\">\n      <div style=\"font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:14px; letter-spacing:.5em; color:#ff5a3c; text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:6px; animation:mmblink 1s steps(2) infinite;\">警告 ・ VIE PERDUE<\u002Fdiv>\n      <div style=\"font-family:'Anton',sans-serif; font-size:min(16vw,138px); line-height:.82; color:#ff6a44; letter-spacing:.02em; text-shadow:0 6px 0 rgba(0,0,0,.55), 0 0 50px rgba(255,60,30,.5);\">CRASH<\u002Fdiv>\n      <div style=\"margin-top:14px; font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:16px; letter-spacing:.4em; color:#d9542e;\">{{ livesStr }}<\u002Fdiv>\n      <div style=\"display:flex; gap:38px; flex-wrap:wrap; justify-content:center; margin:22px 0 28px; font-family:'Oswald';\">\n        <div style=\"text-align:center;\"><div style=\"font-family:'Anton',sans-serif; font-size:48px; color:#8f6f52; text-decoration:line-through;\">{{ cs }}<\u002Fdiv><div style=\"font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:11px; letter-spacing:.24em; color:#c9752b;\">MANCHE PERDUE<\u002Fdiv><\u002Fdiv>\n        <div style=\"text-align:center;\"><div style=\"font-family:'Anton',sans-serif; font-size:48px; color:#f4e6cf;\">{{ cf }}<\u002Fdiv><div style=\"font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:11px; letter-spacing:.24em; color:#c9752b;\">FIGURES<\u002Fdiv><\u002Fdiv>\n        <div style=\"text-align:center;\"><div style=\"font-family:'Anton',sans-serif; font-size:48px; color:#ffd27a;\">{{ banked }}<\u002Fdiv><div style=\"font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:11px; letter-spacing:.24em; color:#c9752b;\">TOTAL PARTIE<\u002Fdiv><\u002Fdiv>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n      <button onclick=\"{{ onRetry }}\" style=\"pointer-events:auto; cursor:pointer; border:2px solid #e8a94a; background:transparent; color:#e8a94a; font-family:'Anton',sans-serif; font-size:24px; letter-spacing:.14em; padding:15px 48px;\">RÉESSAYER<\u002Fbutton>\n    <\u002Fdiv>\n  <\u002Fsc-if>\n\n  <!-- GAME OVER overlay (0 lives — arcade end) -->\n  <sc-if value=\"{{ isGameOver }}\" hint-placeholder-val=\"{{ false }}\">\n    <div style=\"position:absolute; inset:0; display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; justify-content:center; text-align:center; background:radial-gradient(120% 90% at 50% 45%, rgba(60,10,6,.5), rgba(10,4,2,.94)); padding:24px; overflow:auto;\">\n      <div style=\"font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:14px; letter-spacing:.5em; color:#ff5a3c; text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:6px; animation:mmblink 1s steps(2) infinite;\">警告 ・ FIN DE PARTIE<\u002Fdiv>\n      <div style=\"font-family:'Anton',sans-serif; font-size:min(15vw,120px); line-height:.82; color:#ff6a44; letter-spacing:.02em; text-shadow:0 6px 0 rgba(0,0,0,.55), 0 0 50px rgba(255,60,30,.5);\">GAME OVER<\u002Fdiv>\n      <div style=\"margin:24px 0 6px; font-family:'Anton',sans-serif; font-size:64px; color:#ffd27a; text-shadow:0 4px 0 rgba(0,0,0,.5);\">{{ finalScore }}<\u002Fdiv>\n      <div style=\"font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:11px; letter-spacing:.3em; color:#c9752b; margin-bottom:22px;\">SCORE TOTAL ・ NIVEAUX RÉUSSIS<\u002Fdiv>\n      <sc-if value=\"{{ entryOpen }}\" hint-placeholder-val=\"{{ false }}\">\n        <div style=\"display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; gap:12px; margin-bottom:10px;\">\n          <div style=\"font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:13px; letter-spacing:.28em; color:#ffd27a; animation:mmblink 1.4s ease-in-out infinite;\">NOUVEAU RECORD ・ VOS INITIALES<\u002Fdiv>\n          <input data-hud=\"pseudo\" maxlength=\"3\" placeholder=\"AAA\" style=\"pointer-events:auto; width:170px; text-align:center; background:rgba(0,0,0,.5); border:2px solid #e8a94a; color:#ffd27a; font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:44px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:.3em; text-transform:uppercase; padding:8px 0 8px 12px; outline:none;\">\n          <button onclick=\"{{ onSaveScore }}\" style=\"pointer-events:auto; cursor:pointer; border:2px solid #e8a94a; background:#e8a94a; color:#1a0c06; font-family:'Anton',sans-serif; font-size:20px; letter-spacing:.14em; padding:12px 40px;\">VALIDER<\u002Fbutton>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n      <\u002Fsc-if>\n      <sc-if value=\"{{ showTable }}\" hint-placeholder-val=\"{{ false }}\">\n        <div style=\"display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; gap:16px;\">\n          <sc-if value=\"{{ hasScores }}\" hint-placeholder-val=\"{{ false }}\">\n            <div style=\"display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:5px; min-width:250px;\">\n              <div style=\"font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:11px; letter-spacing:.42em; color:#e8a94a; margin-bottom:2px;\">TOP 5<\u002Fdiv>\n              <sc-for list=\"{{ top5 }}\" as=\"e\" hint-placeholder-count=\"0\">\n                <div style=\"display:flex; justify-content:space-between; gap:34px; font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:14px; color:#caa27a;\"><span>{{ e.rank }}. {{ e.name }}<\u002Fspan><span style=\"color:#ffd27a;\">{{ e.score }}<\u002Fspan><\u002Fdiv>\n              <\u002Fsc-for>\n            <\u002Fdiv>\n          <\u002Fsc-if>\n          <div style=\"display:flex; gap:18px; flex-wrap:wrap; justify-content:center;\">\n            <button onclick=\"{{ onNewGame }}\" style=\"pointer-events:auto; cursor:pointer; touch-action:manipulation; -webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent; border:2px solid #d9542e; background:#d9542e; color:#1a0c06; font-family:'Anton',sans-serif; font-size:24px; letter-spacing:.14em; padding:15px 48px;\">NOUVELLE PARTIE<\u002Fbutton>\n            <button onclick=\"{{ onMenu }}\" style=\"pointer-events:auto; cursor:pointer; touch-action:manipulation; -webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent; border:2px solid #e8a94a; background:transparent; color:#e8a94a; font-family:'Anton',sans-serif; font-size:24px; letter-spacing:.14em; padding:15px 48px;\">MENU<\u002Fbutton>\n          <\u002Fdiv>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n      <\u002Fsc-if>\n    <\u002Fdiv>\n  <\u002Fsc-if>\n\n  <!-- LEVEL COMPLETE overlay -->\n  <sc-if value=\"{{ isComplete }}\" hint-placeholder-val=\"{{ false }}\">\n    <div style=\"position:absolute; inset:0; display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; justify-content:center; text-align:center; background:radial-gradient(120% 90% at 50% 45%, rgba(40,30,8,.4), rgba(14,7,3,.88)); padding:24px;\">\n      <div style=\"font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:14px; letter-spacing:.5em; color:#ffd27a; text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:6px;\">突破 ・ SECTEUR FRANCHI<\u002Fdiv>\n      <div style=\"font-family:'Anton',sans-serif; font-size:min(16vw,138px); line-height:.82; color:#ffd27a; letter-spacing:.04em; text-shadow:0 6px 0 rgba(120,50,10,.5), 0 0 50px rgba(255,190,80,.45);\">CLEAR<\u002Fdiv>\n      <div style=\"display:flex; gap:38px; flex-wrap:wrap; justify-content:center; margin:26px 0 30px; font-family:'Oswald';\">\n        <div style=\"text-align:center;\"><div style=\"font-family:'Anton',sans-serif; font-size:44px; color:#f4e6cf;\">{{ kt }}<\u002Fdiv><div style=\"font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:11px; letter-spacing:.22em; color:#c9752b;\">TEMPS<\u002Fdiv><\u002Fdiv>\n        <div style=\"text-align:center;\"><div style=\"font-family:'Anton',sans-serif; font-size:44px; color:#7ec96a;\">{{ kb }}<\u002Fdiv><div style=\"font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:11px; letter-spacing:.22em; color:#c9752b;\">BONUS<\u002Fdiv><\u002Fdiv>\n        <div style=\"text-align:center;\"><div style=\"font-family:'Anton',sans-serif; font-size:44px; color:#f4e6cf;\">{{ ks }}<\u002Fdiv><div style=\"font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:11px; letter-spacing:.22em; color:#c9752b;\">NIVEAU<\u002Fdiv><\u002Fdiv>\n        <div style=\"text-align:center;\"><div style=\"font-family:'Anton',sans-serif; font-size:44px; color:#ffd27a;\">{{ banked }}<\u002Fdiv><div style=\"font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:11px; letter-spacing:.22em; color:#c9752b;\">TOTAL PARTIE<\u002Fdiv><\u002Fdiv>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n      <button onclick=\"{{ onNext }}\" style=\"pointer-events:auto; cursor:pointer; border:2px solid #7ec96a; background:#7ec96a; color:#132009; font-family:'Anton',sans-serif; font-size:24px; letter-spacing:.14em; padding:15px 48px; box-shadow:0 8px 30px rgba(126,201,106,.3);\">SECTEUR SUIVANT<\u002Fbutton>\n    <\u002Fdiv>\n  <\u002Fsc-if>\n\n<\u002Fdiv>\n<\u002Fx-dc>\n<script type=\"text/x-dc\" data-dc-script=\"\" data-props=\"{&quot;$preview&quot;:{&quot;width&quot;:&quot;100%&quot;,&quot;height&quot;:&quot;100%&quot;},&quot;perso&quot;:{&quot;editor&quot;:&quot;enum&quot;,&quot;options&quot;:[&quot;masculin&quot;,&quot;feminin&quot;],&quot;default&quot;:&quot;masculin&quot;,&quot;tsType&quot;:&quot;string&quot;,&quot;section&quot;:&quot;Jeu&quot;},&quot;difficulty&quot;:{&quot;editor&quot;:&quot;enum&quot;,&quot;options&quot;:[&quot;facile&quot;,&quot;normal&quot;,&quot;difficile&quot;],&quot;default&quot;:&quot;normal&quot;,&quot;tsType&quot;:&quot;string&quot;,&quot;section&quot;:&quot;Jeu&quot;},&quot;decollage&quot;:{&quot;editor&quot;:&quot;range&quot;,&quot;default&quot;:1.1,&quot;min&quot;:0.4,&quot;max&quot;:2,&quot;step&quot;:0.1,&quot;tsType&quot;:&quot;number&quot;,&quot;section&quot;:&quot;Feeling&quot;,&quot;unit&quot;:&quot;×&quot;},&quot;flottement&quot;:{&quot;editor&quot;:&quot;range&quot;,&quot;default&quot;:1.4,&quot;min&quot;:0.6,&quot;max&quot;:2.2,&quot;step&quot;:0.1,&quot;tsType&quot;:&quot;number&quot;,&quot;section&quot;:&quot;Feeling&quot;,&quot;unit&quot;:&quot;×&quot;},&quot;tailleRoues&quot;:{&quot;editor&quot;:&quot;range&quot;,&quot;default&quot;:1.02,&quot;min&quot;:0.7,&quot;max&quot;:1.8,&quot;step&quot;:0.02,&quot;tsType&quot;:&quot;number&quot;,&quot;section&quot;:&quot;Sprites&quot;,&quot;unit&quot;:&quot;×&quot;},&quot;taillePilote&quot;:{&quot;editor&quot;:&quot;range&quot;,&quot;default&quot;:1.16,&quot;min&quot;:0.5,&quot;max&quot;:1.6,&quot;step&quot;:0.02,&quot;tsType&quot;:&quot;number&quot;,&quot;section&quot;:&quot;Sprites&quot;,&quot;unit&quot;:&quot;×&quot;},&quot;piloteX&quot;:{&quot;editor&quot;:&quot;range&quot;,&quot;default&quot;:-17,&quot;min&quot;:-50,&quot;max&quot;:50,&quot;step&quot;:1,&quot;tsType&quot;:&quot;number&quot;,&quot;section&quot;:&quot;Sprites&quot;,&quot;unit&quot;:&quot;px&quot;},&quot;piloteY&quot;:{&quot;editor&quot;:&quot;range&quot;,&quot;default&quot;:-6,&quot;min&quot;:-60,&quot;max&quot;:30,&quot;step&quot;:1,&quot;tsType&quot;:&quot;number&quot;,&quot;section&quot;:&quot;Sprites&quot;,&quot;unit&quot;:&quot;px&quot;},&quot;axeArX&quot;:{&quot;editor&quot;:&quot;range&quot;,&quot;default&quot;:18,&quot;min&quot;:0,&quot;max&quot;:150,&quot;step&quot;:1,&quot;tsType&quot;:&quot;number&quot;,&quot;section&quot;:&quot;Sprites&quot;,&quot;unit&quot;:&quot;px&quot;},&quot;axeArY&quot;:{&quot;editor&quot;:&quot;range&quot;,&quot;default&quot;:173,&quot;min&quot;:100,&quot;max&quot;:210,&quot;step&quot;:1,&quot;tsType&quot;:&quot;number&quot;,&quot;section&quot;:&quot;Sprites&quot;,&quot;unit&quot;:&quot;px&quot;},&quot;axeAvX&quot;:{&quot;editor&quot;:&quot;range&quot;,&quot;default&quot;:361,&quot;min&quot;:240,&quot;max&quot;:367,&quot;step&quot;:1,&quot;tsType&quot;:&quot;number&quot;,&quot;section&quot;:&quot;Sprites&quot;,&quot;unit&quot;:&quot;px&quot;},&quot;axeAvY&quot;:{&quot;editor&quot;:&quot;range&quot;,&quot;default&quot;:164,&quot;min&quot;:100,&quot;max&quot;:210,&quot;step&quot;:1,&quot;tsType&quot;:&quot;number&quot;,&quot;section&quot;:&quot;Sprites&quot;,&quot;unit&quot;:&quot;px&quot;},&quot;grain&quot;:{&quot;editor&quot;:&quot;boolean&quot;,&quot;default&quot;:true,&quot;tsType&quot;:&quot;boolean&quot;,&quot;section&quot;:&quot;Ambiance&quot;},&quot;showSlots&quot;:{&quot;editor&quot;:&quot;boolean&quot;,&quot;default&quot;:false,&quot;tsType&quot;:&quot;boolean&quot;,&quot;section&quot;:&quot;Ambiance&quot;},&quot;screenShake&quot;:{&quot;editor&quot;:&quot;boolean&quot;,&quot;default&quot;:true,&quot;tsType&quot;:&quot;boolean&quot;,&quot;section&quot;:&quot;Ambiance&quot;}}\">\nclass Component extends DCLogic {\n  state = { screen:'start', best:0, top5:[], banked:0, lives:3, cs:0, cf:0, kt:'0.0s', kb:'+0', ks:0, finalScore:0, qualifies:false, saved:false, persoSel:null };\n\n  componentDidMount(){\n    this.canvas = this.root.querySelector('canvas');\n    this.ctx = this.canvas.getContext('2d');\n    this.spr = {};\n    const load = (key, file)=>{ const im=new Image(); im.onload=()=>{ this.spr[key]=im; }; im.src=(window.__resources&&window.__resources[key])||('assets/'+file); };\n    load('moto','f_moto.png'); load('wheelR','f_wheelRear.png'); load('wheelF','f_wheelFront.png');\n    load('joeM','f_pilotM_sit.png'); load('joeF','f_pilotF_sit.png');\n    load('downM','f_pilotM_down.png'); load('downF','f_pilotF_down.png');\n    load('scarecrow','f_scarecrow.png'); load('crow','f_crow_static.png'); load('crowFly','f_crow_fly.png'); load('tornado','f_tornado.png');\n    for(let i=1;i<=4;i++){ load('rock'+i,'f_rock'+i+'.png'); load('car'+i,'f_car'+i+'.png'); }\n    // chassis axle anchors (in chassis-sprite px, defaults — tweakable via props)\n    this.chassisAxle = { rear:{x:18,y:173}, front:{x:361,y:164} };\n    this.input = { gas:false, brake:false };\n    this.cam = { x:0, y:0, shake:0 };\n    this.particles = [];\n    this.tw = [];\n    let t5=[];\n    try{ t5 = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('mm_top5')||'[]'); }catch(e){ t5=[]; }\n    if(!Array.isArray(t5)) t5=[];\n    this.top5 = t5.filter(e=>e && typeof e.score==='number').slice(0,5);\n    this.best = this.top5.length ? this.top5[0].score : (parseInt(localStorage.getItem('mm_best')||'0',10)||0);\n    this.lives = 3; this.banked = 0;\n    this.hud = {};\n    ['wrap','pads','score','combo','speed','dist','lvl','progfill','trick','lives'].forEach(k=>{\n      this.hud[k] = this.root.querySelector('[data-hud=\"'+k+'\"]');\n    });\n    this.trickTimer = 0;\n    let ps=null; try{ ps = localStorage.getItem('mm_perso'); }catch(e){}\n    this.setState({ best:this.best, top5:this.top5.slice(), persoSel:(ps==='feminin'||ps==='masculin')?ps:null });\n    this._bd = e=>this.key(e,true); this._bu = e=>this.key(e,false);\n    window.addEventListener('keydown', this._bd);\n    window.addEventListener('keyup', this._bu);\n    this._rs = ()=>this.resize(); window.addEventListener('resize', this._rs);\n    this.resize();\n    this.reset(1);\n    this.last = performance.now();\n    this.raf = requestAnimationFrame(this.loop);\n  }\n  componentWillUnmount(){\n    cancelAnimationFrame(this.raf);\n    window.removeEventListener('keydown', this._bd);\n    window.removeEventListener('keyup', this._bu);\n    window.removeEventListener('resize', this._rs);\n  }\n  componentDidUpdate(prev){\n    if(prev && prev.difficulty !== this.props.difficulty){\n      this.lives=3; this.banked=0;\n      this.reset(1); this.setState({ screen:'start', banked:0, lives:3 });\n    }\n  }\n\n  key(e, down){\n    if(e.target && e.target.tagName==='INPUT'){\n      if(down && (e.code==='Enter'||e.code==='NumpadEnter')) this.saveScore();\n      return;\n    }\n    const k = e.code;\n    if(k==='KeyR'){ if(down){ e.preventDefault(); this.newGame(); } return; }\n    if(k==='Escape'||k==='KeyP'){\n      if(down){\n        if(this.state.screen==='playing'){ this.input.gas=false; this.input.brake=false; this.setState({ screen:'paused' }); }\n        else if(this.state.screen==='paused') this.setState({ screen:'playing' });\n      }\n      return;\n    }\n    if(k==='ArrowRight'||k==='KeyD'){ this.input.gas = down; e.preventDefault(); }\n    else if(k==='ArrowLeft'||k==='KeyA'){ this.input.brake = down; e.preventDefault(); }\n    else if((k==='Space'||k==='Enter') && down){\n      e.preventDefault();\n      const s = this.state.screen;\n      if(s==='start') this.newGame();\n      else if(s==='crashed') this.retry();\n      else if(s==='complete') this.nextLevel();\n      else if(s==='gameover' && !(this.state.qualifies && !this.state.saved)) this.newGame();\n    }\n  }\n\n  resize(){\n    const dpr = Math.min(2, window.devicePixelRatio||1);\n    const r = this.canvas.getBoundingClientRect();\n    this.W = Math.max(1, r.width); this.H = Math.max(1, r.height);\n    this.canvas.width = this.W*dpr; this.canvas.height = this.H*dpr;\n    this.ctx.setTransform(dpr,0,0,dpr,0,0);\n  }\n\n  // ---------- level generation ----------\n  reset(level){\n    this.level = level;\n    const diff = this.props.difficulty || 'normal';\n    this.diffMul = diff==='facile' ? 0.75 : diff==='difficile' ? 1.25 : 1.0;\n    this.cfg = {\n      g:2100, m:1, I:900, wheelR:34,\n      wheels:[{x:-78,y:28},{x:82,y:28}],\n      bodyPts:[{x:-6,y:-48},{x:-22,y:-32},{x:20,y:-36}],\n      k:520, c:32, drivePower:2650, brakePower:1500, wheelieK:2600, leanDamp:230, roll:1.35, climbAssist:0,\n      airSpin:5.4, airResp:7, airSettle:2.6, airGrav:0.30, launchGain:14, linDrag:0.009, angDrag:3.4, airDrag:0.02, substeps:8, maxV:3400,\n      baseY:410, baseAmp:132, startFlat:720, rampDist:1800,\n      levelLen: 6200 + level*1400\n    };\n    this.seed = 1000 + level*137.13;\n    // player-tunable feel\n    const envol = this.props.decollage ?? 1.1;     // takeoff ease\n    const flott = this.props.flottement ?? 1.4;    // air floatiness\n    this.cfg.launchGain *= (0.4 + envol*0.6);\n    this.cfg.airGrav = Math.max(0.14, this.cfg.airGrav / Math.max(0.4, flott));\n    this.finishX = this.cfg.levelLen;\n    this.genTerrain();\n    // bike\n    const x0 = 200;\n    this.bike = { x:x0, y:this.groundY(x0)-62, vx:0, vy:0, a:0, av:0, spin:0, maxX:x0, m:this.cfg.m, I:this.cfg.I };\n    this.wheelContact = [false,false];\n    this.ragdoll = null;\n    this.air = { time:0, rot:0, was:false };\n    this.wheelie = 0; this.invTime = 0;\n    this.combo = 1; this.trickTotal = 0; this.flipCount = 0;\n    this.runTime = 0;\n    this.cam.x = this.bike.x - this.W*0.38;\n    this.cam.y = this.bike.y - this.H*0.56;\n    this.particles.length = 0; this.tw.length = 0;\n    this.twTimer = 0;\n    this.popups = []; this.popupBusy = false;\n    this.hudFrozen = false;\n  }\n\n  genTerrain(){\n    const c = this.cfg, dm = this.diffMul;\n    // designed features first: jump kickers (big air) + whoops sections (technical control)\n    const rng2 = this.mulberry(Math.floor(this.seed*3.7)+91);\n    this.features = [];\n    let fx = c.startFlat + 500;\n    while(fx < this.finishX - 700){\n      const r = rng2();\n      if(r < 0.58){\n        // launch hill: tall gaussian kicker — crest it at speed to fly\n        const amp = (125 + rng2()*130)*(0.75 + 0.25*dm);\n        const w = 290 + rng2()*150;\n        this.features.push({ type:'jump', x:fx+w, amp, w });\n        fx += w*2 + 260 + rng2()*320;\n      } else if(r < 0.82){\n        // whoops: run of small sharp bumps — full throttle here gets punished\n        const len = 280 + rng2()*320;\n        const lam = 145 + rng2()*70;\n        const amp = (11 + rng2()*9)*dm;\n        this.features.push({ type:'whoops', x:fx, len, lam, amp });\n        fx += len + 340 + rng2()*380;\n      } else {\n        fx += 400 + rng2()*460;  // breather gap\n      }\n    }\n    // decor: sparse and coherent — obstacles kept off the jumps, crows perch near scarecrows\n    const rng = this.mulberry(Math.floor(this.seed*7.3));\n    this.hazards = []; this.decor = [];\n    const nearFeature = (x)=> this.features.some(f=> f.type==='jump' ? Math.abs(x-f.x)<f.w*2.2 : (x>f.x-140 && x<f.x+f.len+140));\n    let x = 900;\n    while(x < this.finishX - 500){\n      const r = rng();\n      if(r < 0.42 && !nearFeature(x)){\n        // obstacle on open ground: mostly rocks, occasionally a wreck\n        if(rng() < 0.62){ const h=22+rng()*22, w=h*2.4+52; this.hazards.push({x,w,h}); this.decor.push({ x, type:'rock', variant:(rng()*4)|0, h, w }); }\n        else { const h=38+rng()*26, w=h*2.6+74; this.hazards.push({x,w,h}); this.decor.push({ x, type:'wreck', variant:(rng()*4)|0, h, w }); }\n      } else if(r < 0.58){\n        // landmark: scarecrow, often with a crow perched close by\n        this.decor.push({ x, type:'scarecrow' });\n        if(rng() < 0.55) this.decor.push({ x:x+40+rng()*50, type:'crow', crow:{ flew:false, x:0, y:0, vx:0, vy:0, fl:rng()*6.28, t:0 } });\n      }\n      // else: empty desert stretch\n      x += 520 + rng()*420;\n    }\n  }\n\n  mulberry(a){ return function(){ a|=0; a=a+0x6D2B79F5|0; let t=Math.imul(a^a>>>15,1|a); t=t+Math.imul(t^t>>>7,61|t)^t; return ((t^t>>>14)>>>0)/4294967296; }; }\n  h1(i){ const s=Math.sin(i*127.1 + this.seed*311.7)*43758.5453; return s-Math.floor(s); }\n  noise(x){ const i=Math.floor(x), f=x-i, u=f*f*(3-2*f); return this.h1(i)*(1-u)+this.h1(i+1)*u; }\n\n  groundY(x){\n    const c = this.cfg;\n    const rough = Math.min(1, Math.max(0,(x - c.startFlat)/c.rampDist));\n    const dm = this.diffMul;\n    // rolling base (slope-bounded) + designed features on top\n    const bigAmp = c.baseAmp*0.62 * (0.45 + 0.55*rough) * (0.8 + 0.2*dm);\n    const medAmp = 30 * rough * dm;\n    let h = (this.noise(x*0.00058)-0.5)*2*bigAmp;                   // long rollers (~1700px)\n    h += (this.noise(x*0.0016+13)-0.5)*2*medAmp;                    // mid undulation (~600px)\n    h += (this.noise(x*0.006+31)-0.5)*2*6*rough;                    // faint texture\n    let y = c.baseY + h;\n    const ft = this.features || [];\n    for(let i=0;i<ft.length;i++){\n      const f = ft[i];\n      if(f.type==='jump'){\n        const dx = x - f.x;\n        if(dx>-f.w*3 && dx<f.w*3) y -= f.amp*Math.exp(-(dx*dx)/(f.w*f.w));\n      } else if(x>=f.x && x<=f.x+f.len){\n        const env = Math.sin(Math.PI*(x-f.x)/f.len);\n        const s = Math.sin(Math.PI*(x-f.x)/f.lam);\n        y -= f.amp*env*env*s*s;\n      }\n    }\n    const hz = this.hazards;\n    for(let i=0;i<hz.length;i++){\n      const dx = x - hz[i].x;\n      if(dx>-hz[i].w*3 && dx<hz[i].w*3) y -= hz[i].h*Math.exp(-(dx*dx)/(hz[i].w*hz[i].w));\n    }\n    if(x < c.startFlat){ const t = Math.max(0, x/c.startFlat); y = c.baseY + (y-c.baseY)*t*t; }\n    if(x > this.finishX-260){ const t = Math.min(1,(x-(this.finishX-260))/260); y = y + (c.baseY - y)*t*t; }\n    return y;\n  }\n  slope(x){ return (this.groundY(x+2)-this.groundY(x-2))/4; }\n\n  // ---------- run control ----------\n  newGame(){ this.lives=3; this.banked=0; this.reset(1); this.setState({ screen:'playing', banked:0, lives:3, saved:false, qualifies:false }); }\n  toMenu(){ this.lives=3; this.banked=0; this.input.gas=false; this.input.brake=false; this.reset(1); this.setState({ screen:'start', banked:0, lives:3, saved:false, qualifies:false }); }\n  retry(){ this.reset(this.level); this.setState({ screen:'playing' }); }\n  nextLevel(){ this.reset(this.level+1); this.setState({ screen:'playing' }); }\n\n  crash(){\n    if(this.state.screen!=='playing' || this.ragdoll) return;\n    const b = this.bike;\n    this.ragdoll = { x:b.x-4, y:b.y-24, vx:b.vx*0.7 + (Math.random()-0.3)*140, vy:b.vy*0.7 - 260, a:b.a, av:b.av + (Math.random()-0.5)*10, rest:false };\n    const runScore = this.runScore();\n    this.hudFrozen = true;\n    this.lives--;\n    this.input.gas=false; this.input.brake=false;\n    setTimeout(()=>{\n      if(this.lives<=0){\n        const final = this.banked;\n        const qualifies = final>0 && (this.top5.length<5 || final>this.top5[this.top5.length-1].score);\n        this.pendingScore = final;\n        this.setState({ screen:'gameover', finalScore:final, qualifies, saved:false, cs:runScore, cf:this.flipCount, lives:0 });\n        if(qualifies) setTimeout(()=>{ const el=this.root.querySelector('[data-hud=\"pseudo\"]'); if(el) el.focus(); }, 120);\n      } else {\n        this.setState({ screen:'crashed', cs:runScore, cf:this.flipCount, lives:this.lives, banked:this.banked });\n      }\n    }, 900);\n  }\n  complete(){\n    if(this.state.screen!=='playing') return;\n    this.hudFrozen = true;               // freeze the HUD instantly — no double-count flash\n    if(this.air.was) this.settleAir();   // credit a flip in progress when crossing the line airborne\n    const par = this.finishX/300;\n    const bonus = Math.max(0, Math.floor((par - this.runTime))*45);\n    const levelScore = this.runScore() + bonus;\n    this.banked += levelScore;\n    this.input.gas=false; this.input.brake=false;\n    this.setState({ screen:'complete', kt:this.runTime.toFixed(1)+'s', kb:'+'+bonus, ks:levelScore, banked:this.banked });\n  }\n\n  saveScore(){\n    if(!(this.state.qualifies && !this.state.saved)) return;\n    const el = this.root.querySelector('[data-hud=\"pseudo\"]');\n    let name = (el && el.value ? el.value : 'AAA').toUpperCase().replace(/[^A-Z0-9]/g,'').slice(0,3);\n    if(!name) name='AAA';\n    this.top5.push({ name, score:this.pendingScore });\n    this.top5.sort((a,b)=>b.score-a.score);\n    this.top5 = this.top5.slice(0,5);\n    this.best = this.top5[0].score;\n    try{\n      localStorage.setItem('mm_top5', JSON.stringify(this.top5));\n      localStorage.setItem('mm_best', String(this.best));\n    }catch(e){}\n    this.setState({ saved:true, top5:this.top5.slice(), best:this.best });\n  }\n\n  perso(){ return this.state.persoSel || this.props.perso || 'masculin'; }\n  setPerso(p){ try{ localStorage.setItem('mm_perso', p); }catch(e){} this.setState({ persoSel:p }); }\n\n  // single source of truth for the current run's score (distance capped at the finish line)\n  runScore(){ return this.trickTotal + Math.floor(Math.min(this.bike.maxX, this.finishX)/8); }\n\n  // score any pending air trick (called on landing AND when crossing the finish line mid-air)\n  settleAir(){\n    const flips = Math.round(this.air.rot/(2*Math.PI));\n    const n = Math.abs(flips);\n    if(n>=1){\n      this.combo = Math.min(9, this.combo+1);\n      this.flipCount += n;\n      const back = this.air.rot<0;\n      let nm, pts;\n      if(n===2){ nm='DOUBLE '+(back?'BACKFLIP':'FRONTFLIP'); pts=200; }\n      else if(n>2){ nm=n+'× '+(back?'BACKFLIP':'FRONTFLIP'); pts=200+(n-2)*100; }\n      else { nm=back?'BACKFLIP':'FRONTFLIP'; pts=back?50:75; }\n      this.award(nm, pts);\n    }\n    if(this.air.time>0.75){ this.award('AIR '+this.air.time.toFixed(1)+'s', Math.floor(this.air.time*55)); }\n    this.air.time=0; this.air.rot=0; this.air.was=false;\n  }\n\n  setDom(k, v){ const el = this.root.querySelector('[data-hud=\"'+k+'\"]'); if(el) el.textContent = v; }\n\n  award(text, pts){\n    const gain = Math.round(pts*this.combo);\n    this.trickTotal += gain;\n    // queued popups: simultaneous awards (flip + AIR) show one after the other instead of overwriting\n    this.popups = this.popups || [];\n    this.popups.push(text + '  +' + gain);\n    if(!this.popupBusy) this.nextPopup();\n  }\n  nextPopup(){\n    if(!this.popups || !this.popups.length){ this.popupBusy=false; return; }\n    this.popupBusy = true;\n    const msg = this.popups.shift();\n    const el = this.root && this.root.querySelector('[data-hud=\"trick\"]');\n    if(el){\n      el.textContent = msg;\n      el.style.animation = 'none';\n      void el.offsetWidth;\n      el.style.animation = 'mmpop 1.05s ease-out forwards';\n    }\n    setTimeout(()=>this.nextPopup(), 750);\n  }\n\n  // ---------- physics ----------\n  substep(h){\n    const b = this.bike, c = this.cfg;\n    let Fx=0, Fy=0, T=0;\n    const contacts=[false,false];\n    const ca=Math.cos(b.a), sa=Math.sin(b.a);\n    let driveTx=1, driveTy=0; this._frontTx=1; this._frontTy=0;\n    for(let wi=0; wi<2; wi++){\n      const o = c.wheels[wi];\n      const rx = o.x*ca - o.y*sa, ry = o.x*sa + o.y*ca;\n      const px = b.x+rx, py = b.y+ry;\n      const gy = this.groundY(px);\n      const pen = (py+c.wheelR) - gy;\n      if(pen>0){\n        contacts[wi]=true;\n        const sl=this.slope(px);\n        let nx=sl, ny=-1; const nl=Math.hypot(nx,ny)||1; nx/=nl; ny/=nl;\n        let tx=1, ty=sl; const tl=Math.hypot(tx,ty)||1; tx/=tl; ty/=tl;\n        const vx = b.vx - b.av*ry, vy = b.vy + b.av*rx;\n        const vn = vx*nx+vy*ny, vt = vx*tx+vy*ty;\n        let Fn = c.k*Math.min(pen,60) - c.c*vn; if(Fn<0) Fn=0; if(Fn>26000) Fn=26000;\n        const Ft = -c.roll*vt*(wi===1?0.45:1); // rolling drag — front wheel grabs far less (rear weight bias)\n        const fx = Fn*nx + Ft*tx, fy = Fn*ny + Ft*ty;\n        Fx+=fx; Fy+=fy; T += rx*fy - ry*fx;\n        if(wi===0){ driveTx=tx; driveTy=ty; } else { this._frontTx=tx; this._frontTy=ty; }\n        if(this.state.screen==='playing' && Math.abs(vt)>70 && Math.random()<0.35) this.spawnDust(px,gy,vt,sl);\n      }\n    }\n    this.wheelContact = contacts;\n    const air = !(contacts[0]||contacts[1]);\n    // gravity — reduced in the air for hang time (more time to flip / re-aim)\n    Fy += c.g * b.m * (air ? c.airGrav : 1);\n    if(!air && this.state.screen==='playing'){\n      const rearGrip = contacts[0];               // motorcycle is rear-wheel driven\n      const btx = rearGrip ? driveTx : this._frontTx, bty = rearGrip ? driveTy : this._frontTy;\n      const spd = Math.abs(b.vx), dirs = b.vx>=0?1:-1;\n      if(this.input.gas){\n        // punchy propulsion: big shove at low speed, tapers to normal power at high speed;\n        // front-only contact still pushes at 55% so bump crests don't kill momentum\n        const punch = 1.55 - 0.55*Math.min(1, spd/850);\n        const cap = Math.max(0, 1 - Math.pow(spd/1900, 3));   // soft top-speed cap — same punch, lower cruise\n        const pw = c.drivePower*punch*cap*(rearGrip?1:0.55);\n        Fx += pw*btx; Fy += pw*bty;\n        if(rearGrip) T += c.wheelieK*(-0.44 - b.a) - c.leanDamp*b.av;   // wheelie torque only rear-wheel-down\n      } else if(!this.input.brake){\n        // engine braking: releasing the throttle bleeds speed noticeably\n        const eb = Math.min(spd*6, 950);\n        Fx -= eb*btx*dirs; Fy -= eb*bty*dirs;\n      }\n      // braking works on whichever wheel is down; stoppie lean only eases, never kicks\n      if(this.input.brake){ Fx -= c.brakePower*btx; Fy -= c.brakePower*bty; if(rearGrip) T += c.wheelieK*(0.30 - b.a) - c.leanDamp*b.av; }\n    }\n    if(air && this.state.screen==='playing'){\n      // rate-controlled air spin: predictable flip cadence, releasing eases to a stop so you can line up the landing\n      let target = 0;\n      if(this.input.gas) target = -c.airSpin;        // backflip\n      else if(this.input.brake) target = c.airSpin;  // frontflip\n      const rate = (this.input.gas||this.input.brake) ? c.airResp : c.airSettle;\n      b.av += (target - b.av) * Math.min(1, rate*h);\n    }\n    b.vx += (Fx/b.m)*h; b.vy += (Fy/b.m)*h; b.av += (T/b.I)*h;\n    b.vx *= (1 - c.linDrag*h);\n    b.av *= (1 - (air?c.airDrag:c.angDrag)*h);\n    b.vx = Math.max(-c.maxV, Math.min(c.maxV, b.vx));\n    b.vy = Math.max(-3600, Math.min(3600, b.vy));\n    b.av = Math.max(-26, Math.min(26, b.av));\n    b.x += b.vx*h; b.y += b.vy*h; b.a += b.av*h;\n    b.spin += b.vx*h/c.wheelR;\n  }\n\n  checkCrash(){\n    // game over ONLY when the rider's body actually touches the ground (bike frame/wheels can hit freely)\n    const b=this.bike, ca=Math.cos(b.a), sa=Math.sin(b.a), c=this.cfg;\n    for(let i=0;i<c.bodyPts.length;i++){\n      const p=c.bodyPts[i];\n      const wx=b.x+(p.x*ca-p.y*sa), wy=b.y+(p.x*sa+p.y*ca);\n      if(wy - this.groundY(wx) > 2) return true;\n    }\n    return false;\n  }\n\n  spawnDust(x,y,vt,sl){\n    const dir = vt>0?-1:1;\n    this.particles.push({ x, y:y-4, vx:dir*(40+Math.random()*70), vy:-30-Math.random()*70, life:1, r:5+Math.random()*8, kind:'dust' });\n  }\n\n  step(dt){\n    const N = this.cfg.substeps, h = dt/N;\n    for(let i=0;i<N;i++) this.substep(h);\n    const b = this.bike;\n    b.maxX = Math.max(b.maxX, b.x);\n    // tricks\n    const air = !(this.wheelContact[0]||this.wheelContact[1]);\n    if(air){ this.air.time += dt; this.air.rot += b.av*dt; this.air.was = true; this.air.ground = 0; }\n    else if(this.air.was){\n      // require ~80ms of sustained contact before settling — a one-frame kiss on a bump crest\n      // no longer wipes the rotation of a flip in progress\n      this.air.ground = (this.air.ground||0) + dt;\n      if(this.air.ground > 0.08){\n        if(!this.checkCrash()) this.settleAir();\n        else { this.air.time=0; this.air.rot=0; this.air.was=false; }\n      }\n    }\n    // wheelie\n    const nose = Math.cos(b.a);\n    if(this.wheelContact[0] && !this.wheelContact[1] && b.a<-0.28 && nose>0.2 && Math.abs(b.vx)>50){\n      this.wheelie += dt;\n      if(this.wheelie>0.5){ this.award('WHEELIE', 30); this.wheelie=0; this.combo=Math.min(9,this.combo+1); }\n    } else if(this.wheelie>0){ this.wheelie = Math.max(0, this.wheelie-dt*2); }\n    this.runTime += dt;\n    const onGround = this.wheelContact[0]||this.wheelContact[1];\n    // crest launch-assist: cresting a hill at speed pops the bike into the air (easy takeoff, rewards speed)\n    if(onGround && this.state.screen==='playing'){\n      const dir = b.vx>=0 ? 1 : -1, sp = Math.abs(b.vx);\n      if(sp > 220){\n        const s0 = this.slope(b.x), s1 = this.slope(b.x + dir*60);\n        const crest = (s1 - s0)*dir;   // >0 when the slope tips downhill ahead = a crest\n        if(crest > 0.04){\n          b.vy -= Math.min(crest * sp * this.cfg.launchGain, 3200) * dt;\n        }\n      }\n    }\n    if(onGround && Math.cos(b.a) < -0.55) this.invTime = (this.invTime||0)+dt; else this.invTime = 0;\n    // end states\n    if(this.checkCrash()){ this.combo=1; this.crash(); return; }\n    if(b.x >= this.finishX){ this.complete(); return; }\n    if(b.y > this.cfg.baseY + 1200){ this.crash(); }\n  }\n\n  // ---------- decor / particles update ----------\n  updateWorld(dt){\n    const b=this.bike;\n    for(const d of this.decor){\n      // scarecrow is now fully static (no motion)\n      if(d.type==='crow' && d.crow){\n        const cr=d.crow;\n        if(!cr.flew && b.x > d.x-300 && b.x < d.x+130 && Math.abs(b.vx)>40){\n          cr.flew=true; cr.x=d.x; cr.y=this.groundY(d.x)-14;\n          cr.vx=(b.vx>=0?70:-70)+Math.random()*50; cr.vy=-150-Math.random()*90;\n        }\n        if(cr.flew){ cr.t+=dt; cr.vy += 46*dt; cr.x += cr.vx*dt; cr.y += cr.vy*dt; cr.fl += dt*13; }\n      }\n    }\n    // roaming little tornadoes (replaces the tumbleweeds)\n    if(this.state.screen==='playing'){\n      this.twTimer -= dt;\n      if(this.twTimer<=0 && this.tw.length<3){ this.twTimer = 2.6+Math.random()*3.2; const sx=b.x+this.W*0.8; this.tw.push({x:sx, vx:-26-Math.random()*40, phase:Math.random()*6.28}); }\n    }\n    for(let i=this.tw.length-1;i>=0;i--){\n      const t=this.tw[i]; t.x += t.vx*dt; t.phase += dt*3.2;\n      if(t.x < b.x-this.W*0.75) this.tw.splice(i,1);\n    }\n    for(let i=this.particles.length-1;i>=0;i--){\n      const p=this.particles[i]; p.life -= dt*1.5; p.vy += 60*dt; p.x+=p.vx*dt; p.y+=p.vy*dt; p.r*=1+dt*1.2;\n      if(p.life<=0) this.particles.splice(i,1);\n    }\n    if(this.ragdoll){\n      const g=this.ragdoll;\n      if(!g.rest){\n        g.vy += 1600*dt; g.x+=g.vx*dt; g.y+=g.vy*dt; g.a+=g.av*dt; g.av*=0.99;\n        const gy=this.groundY(g.x)-10;\n        if(g.y>gy){ g.y=gy; g.vy*=-0.35; g.vx*=0.6; g.av*=0.5; if(Math.abs(g.vy)<60){ g.rest=true; g.vy=0; } }\n      } else {\n        g.a += (0 - g.a)*Math.min(1,dt*7);         // settle the fallen rider flat on the ground\n        g.y += (this.groundY(g.x)-10 - g.y)*Math.min(1,dt*7);\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  loop = (now)=>{\n    this.raf = requestAnimationFrame(this.loop);\n    let dt = (now - this.last)/1000; this.last = now;\n    if(dt>0.05) dt = 0.05;\n    if(this.state.screen==='paused'){ this.render(); this.updateHud(false); return; }  // freeze world while paused\n    const playing = this.state.screen==='playing';\n    if(playing) this.step(dt);\n    else { for(let i=0;i<this.cfg.substeps;i++) this.substep(dt/this.cfg.substeps); } // settle / crash physics\n    this.updateWorld(dt);\n    // camera\n    const b=this.bike;\n    const tx = b.x - this.W*0.38, ty = b.y - this.H*0.56;\n    const lp = Math.min(1, dt*6);\n    this.cam.x += (tx-this.cam.x)*lp; this.cam.y += (ty-this.cam.y)*lp;\n    if(this.cam.shake>0){ this.cam.shake -= dt*3; if(this.cam.shake<0)this.cam.shake=0; }\n    this.render();\n    this.updateHud(playing);\n  }\n\n  updateHud(playing){\n    // heal stale references if the UI re-rendered the HUD nodes\n    if(!this.hud.score || !this.hud.score.isConnected){\n      ['wrap','pads','score','combo','speed','dist','lvl','progfill','trick','lives'].forEach(k=>{\n        this.hud[k] = this.root.querySelector('[data-hud=\"'+k+'\"]');\n      });\n      if(!this.hud.score) return;\n    }\n    if(this.hud.wrap) this.hud.wrap.style.opacity = (playing && !this.hudFrozen)?1:0;\n    if(this.hud.pads) this.hud.pads.style.opacity = (playing && !this.hudFrozen)?1:0;\n    if(!playing || this.hudFrozen) return;\n    const b=this.bike;\n    this.hud.score.textContent = this.banked + this.runScore();\n    if(this.hud.lives) this.hud.lives.textContent = '▲'.repeat(Math.max(0,this.lives)) + '△'.repeat(Math.max(0,3-this.lives));\n    this.hud.speed.textContent = Math.round(Math.hypot(b.vx,b.vy)*0.14);\n    this.hud.dist.textContent = Math.floor(b.x/10)+' M';\n    this.hud.lvl.textContent = '砂漠 '+String(this.level).padStart(2,'0');\n    const pr = Math.max(0,Math.min(100, (b.x/this.finishX)*100));\n    this.hud.progfill.style.width = pr+'%';\n    if(this.combo>1){ this.hud.combo.style.opacity=1; this.hud.combo.textContent='COMBO ×'+this.combo; }\n    else this.hud.combo.style.opacity=0;\n  }\n\n  // ---------- render ----------\n  render(){\n    const ctx=this.ctx, W=this.W, H=this.H, cam=this.cam;\n    let shx=0, shy=0;\n    if((this.props.screenShake??true) && cam.shake>0){ shx=(Math.random()-0.5)*cam.shake*14; shy=(Math.random()-0.5)*cam.shake*14; }\n    ctx.save(); ctx.translate(shx,shy);\n    this.sky(ctx,W,H,cam);\n    this.dunes(ctx,W,H,cam,0.16, H*0.60, 26, 'rgba(96,40,22,0.9)', 0.0022);\n    this.dunes(ctx,W,H,cam,0.40, H*0.70, 34, 'rgba(120,52,26,0.95)', 0.0031);\n    this.terrain(ctx,W,H,cam);\n    this.decorLayer(ctx,W,H,cam);\n    this.particlesLayer(ctx,cam);\n    if(this.ragdoll) this.drawRagdoll(ctx,cam);\n    else this.drawBike(ctx,cam);\n    this.finishFlag(ctx,cam);\n    this.speedLines(ctx,W,H);\n    ctx.restore();\n  }\n\n  sky(ctx,W,H,cam){\n    const g=ctx.createLinearGradient(0,0,0,H);\n    g.addColorStop(0,'#241009'); g.addColorStop(0.4,'#6e2f18'); g.addColorStop(0.66,'#b7671f'); g.addColorStop(0.82,'#e2a044'); g.addColorStop(1,'#efc069');\n    ctx.fillStyle=g; ctx.fillRect(-40,-40,W+80,H+80);\n    // sun\n    const sx=W*0.60 - cam.x*0.02%1, sy=H*0.58;\n    const sg=ctx.createRadialGradient(sx,sy,10,sx,sy,180);\n    sg.addColorStop(0,'rgba(255,224,150,0.95)'); sg.addColorStop(0.5,'rgba(255,180,90,0.5)'); sg.addColorStop(1,'rgba(255,150,70,0)');\n    ctx.fillStyle=sg; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(sx,sy,180,0,7); ctx.fill();\n    ctx.fillStyle='#ffd97a'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(sx,sy,86,0,7); ctx.fill();\n    // akira retro sun bands\n    ctx.fillStyle='#b7671f';\n    for(let i=0;i<5;i++){ const yy=sy+18+i*13; ctx.fillRect(sx-90, yy, 180, 4+i*1.4); }\n    // haze\n    ctx.globalAlpha=0.12; ctx.fillStyle='#ffe0a0';\n    for(let i=0;i<4;i++) ctx.fillRect(0, H*0.5+i*16, W, 3);\n    ctx.globalAlpha=1;\n  }\n\n  dunes(ctx,W,H,cam,fac,baseY,amp,color,freq){\n    const off=cam.x*fac - cam.y*0.1;\n    ctx.fillStyle=color; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(-10,H+10);\n    for(let x=-10;x<=W+10;x+=10){\n      const wx=(x+off);\n      const y=baseY + Math.sin(wx*freq)*amp + Math.sin(wx*freq*2.3+1.7)*amp*0.4 - cam.y*0.12;\n      ctx.lineTo(x,y);\n    }\n    ctx.lineTo(W+10,H+10); ctx.closePath(); ctx.fill();\n  }\n\n  terrain(ctx,W,H,cam){\n    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(-4,H+4);\n    const pts=[];\n    for(let sx=-4; sx<=W+4; sx+=3){ const wx=cam.x+sx; const y=this.groundY(wx)-cam.y; pts.push([sx,y]); }\n    ctx.moveTo(pts[0][0],pts[0][1]);\n    for(let i=1;i<pts.length;i++) ctx.lineTo(pts[i][0],pts[i][1]);\n    ctx.lineTo(W+4,H+4); ctx.lineTo(-4,H+4); ctx.closePath();\n    const g=ctx.createLinearGradient(0,H*0.4,0,H);\n    g.addColorStop(0,'#3a1d0f'); g.addColorStop(1,'#1c0e07');\n    ctx.fillStyle=g; ctx.fill();\n    // rim highlight\n    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(pts[0][0],pts[0][1]);\n    for(let i=1;i<pts.length;i++) ctx.lineTo(pts[i][0],pts[i][1]);\n    ctx.strokeStyle='#e79a44'; ctx.lineWidth=3; ctx.stroke();\n    ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(255,210,140,0.35)'; ctx.lineWidth=1; ctx.stroke();\n  }\n\n  worldT(ctx,cam,wx,wy){ ctx.translate(wx-cam.x, wy-cam.y); }\n\n  decorLayer(ctx,W,H,cam){\n    for(const d of this.decor){\n      if(d.x < cam.x-320 || d.x > cam.x+W+320) continue;\n      const gy=this.groundY(d.x);\n      const groundRot = Math.atan(this.slope(d.x));\n      if(d.type==='rock'){ this.groundSprite(ctx,cam,d.x,gy,this.spr['rock'+(d.variant+1)], d.w*1.15, groundRot); }\n      else if(d.type==='wreck'){ this.groundSprite(ctx,cam,d.x,gy,this.spr['car'+(d.variant+1)], d.w*1.2, groundRot); }\n      else if(d.type==='scarecrow'){ this.groundSpriteH(ctx,cam,d.x,gy,this.spr.scarecrow,138,0); }\n      else if(d.type==='crow'){\n        const cr=d.crow;\n        if(cr.flew){ this.flySprite(ctx,cam,cr.x,cr.y,this.spr.crowFly,66,Math.sin(cr.fl)*0.14); }\n        else this.groundSpriteH(ctx,cam,d.x,gy,this.spr.crow,44,0);\n      }\n      if(this.props.showSlots){ ctx.save(); this.worldT(ctx,cam,d.x,gy); this.slotTag(ctx,d.type); ctx.restore(); }\n    }\n    // roaming little tornadoes\n    for(const t of this.tw){ if(t.x<cam.x-140||t.x>cam.x+W+140) continue; this.groundSpriteH(ctx,cam,t.x,this.groundY(t.x),this.spr.tornado,104,Math.sin(t.phase)*0.05); }\n  }\n\n  groundSprite(ctx,cam,wx,gy,img,Wd,rot){ if(!img)return; const Hd=Wd*img.height/img.width; ctx.save(); this.worldT(ctx,cam,wx,gy); if(rot)ctx.rotate(rot); ctx.drawImage(img,-Wd/2,-Hd*0.88,Wd,Hd); ctx.restore(); }\n  groundSpriteH(ctx,cam,wx,gy,img,Hd,rot){ if(!img)return; const Wd=Hd*img.width/img.height; ctx.save(); this.worldT(ctx,cam,wx,gy); if(rot)ctx.rotate(rot); ctx.drawImage(img,-Wd/2,-Hd+2,Wd,Hd); ctx.restore(); }\n  flySprite(ctx,cam,wx,wy,img,Wd,rot){ if(!img)return; const Hd=Wd*img.height/img.width; ctx.save(); this.worldT(ctx,cam,wx,wy); if(rot)ctx.rotate(rot); ctx.drawImage(img,-Wd/2,-Hd/2,Wd,Hd); ctx.restore(); }\n\n  slotTag(ctx,label){\n    ctx.save(); ctx.fillStyle='rgba(255,210,140,0.85)'; ctx.font=\"10px 'Space Mono', monospace\";\n    ctx.textAlign='center'; ctx.fillText('['+label+']', 0, 12);\n    ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(255,210,140,0.4)'; ctx.setLineDash([3,3]); ctx.strokeRect(-22,-58,44,52); ctx.restore();\n  }\n\n  particlesLayer(ctx,cam){\n    for(const p of this.particles){\n      ctx.globalAlpha=Math.max(0,p.life)*0.5;\n      ctx.fillStyle='#c98a4a';\n      ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(p.x-cam.x,p.y-cam.y,p.r,0,7); ctx.fill();\n    }\n    ctx.globalAlpha=1;\n  }\n\n  // ---------- bike sprites ----------\n  axles(){\n    const a=this.chassisAxle, p=this.props;\n    return {\n      rear:{ x:(p.axeArX ?? a.rear.x), y:(p.axeArY ?? a.rear.y) },\n      front:{ x:(p.axeAvX ?? a.front.x), y:(p.axeAvY ?? a.front.y) }\n    };\n  }\n  bikeScale(){\n    const c=this.cfg, a=this.axles();\n    const dxs=a.front.x-a.rear.x, dys=a.front.y-a.rear.y;\n    const dxw=c.wheels[1].x-c.wheels[0].x, dyw=c.wheels[1].y-c.wheels[0].y;\n    return Math.hypot(dxw,dyw)/Math.max(1,Math.hypot(dxs,dys));\n  }\n  drawMotoSprite(ctx){\n    const m=this.spr.moto; if(!m) return;\n    const c=this.cfg, a=this.axles();\n    const dxs=a.front.x-a.rear.x, dys=a.front.y-a.rear.y;\n    const dxw=c.wheels[1].x-c.wheels[0].x, dyw=c.wheels[1].y-c.wheels[0].y;\n    const s = Math.hypot(dxw,dyw)/Math.max(1,Math.hypot(dxs,dys));\n    const rot = Math.atan2(dyw,dxw) - Math.atan2(dys,dxs);\n    // map the sprite so BOTH axle anchors land exactly on the two physics wheel centers\n    ctx.save();\n    ctx.translate(c.wheels[0].x, c.wheels[0].y);\n    ctx.rotate(rot); ctx.scale(s,s);\n    ctx.translate(-a.rear.x, -a.rear.y);\n    ctx.drawImage(m, 0, 0);\n    ctx.restore();\n  }\n  drawWheels(ctx){\n    const rw=this.spr.wheelR, fw=this.spr.wheelF; if(!rw||!fw) return;\n    const c=this.cfg, b=this.bike, imgs=[rw,fw];\n    // wheel display diameter derived from the PHYSICS radius (so visuals match the collisions)\n    const D = 2*c.wheelR*(this.props.tailleRoues ?? 1.02);\n    for(let wi=0; wi<2; wi++){\n      const o=c.wheels[wi], im=imgs[wi];\n      const Wd=D, Hd=D*im.height/im.width;\n      ctx.save(); ctx.translate(o.x, o.y); ctx.rotate(b.spin);\n      ctx.drawImage(im, -Wd/2, -Hd/2, Wd, Hd);\n      ctx.restore();\n    }\n  }\n  drawPiloteSprite(ctx){\n    const p = (this.perso()==='feminin' ? this.spr.joeF : this.spr.joeM); if(!p) return;\n    const s = this.bikeScale()*(this.props.taillePilote ?? 1.16);\n    // anchor = the rider's seat point in the pilot sprite (px), placed on the bike's saddle\n    const ax=90, ay=150;\n    const px=(this.props.piloteX ?? -17), py=(this.props.piloteY ?? -6);\n    ctx.save(); ctx.translate(px, py); ctx.rotate(-0.045);\n    ctx.drawImage(p, -ax*s, -ay*s, p.width*s, p.height*s);\n    ctx.restore();\n  }\n\n  drawBike(ctx,cam){\n    const b=this.bike;\n    ctx.save(); ctx.translate(b.x-cam.x, b.y-cam.y); ctx.rotate(b.a);\n    if(this.input.gas && this.state.screen==='playing'){\n      ctx.fillStyle='rgba(255,140,50,'+(0.4+Math.random()*0.4)+')';\n      ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(-66,18); ctx.lineTo(-90-Math.random()*18,12); ctx.lineTo(-66,23); ctx.closePath(); ctx.fill();\n    }\n    if(this.spr.moto && this.spr.wheelR && this.spr.wheelF){\n      this.drawWheels(ctx);\n      this.drawMotoSprite(ctx);\n      this.drawPiloteSprite(ctx);\n    } else {\n      this.drawBikeVector(ctx);\n    }\n    if(this.props.showSlots) this.slotTag(ctx,'bike');\n    ctx.restore();\n  }\n\n  drawBikeVector(ctx){\n    const b=this.bike, c=this.cfg;\n    for(let wi=0; wi<2; wi++){ const o=c.wheels[wi]; this.drawWheel(ctx,o.x,o.y,c.wheelR,b.spin); }\n    ctx.strokeStyle='#e79a44'; ctx.lineWidth=4; ctx.lineCap='round';\n    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(c.wheels[0].x,c.wheels[0].y); ctx.lineTo(-8,-6); ctx.lineTo(c.wheels[1].x,c.wheels[1].y); ctx.stroke();\n    ctx.fillStyle='#241308';\n    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(-40,10); ctx.lineTo(-30,-14); ctx.lineTo(10,-18); ctx.lineTo(40,-6); ctx.lineTo(46,10); ctx.closePath(); ctx.fill();\n    ctx.fillStyle='#3a1d0f'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(-24,-10); ctx.lineTo(6,-14); ctx.lineTo(2,-2); ctx.lineTo(-22,0); ctx.closePath(); ctx.fill();\n    ctx.strokeStyle='#c9752b'; ctx.lineWidth=3;\n    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(40,-6); ctx.lineTo(52,-16); ctx.stroke();\n    this.drawSkeleton(ctx);\n  }\n  drawWheel(ctx,x,y,r,spin){\n    ctx.save(); ctx.translate(x,y);\n    ctx.fillStyle='#140b06'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(0,0,r,0,7); ctx.fill();\n    ctx.strokeStyle='#3a1d0f'; ctx.lineWidth=5; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(0,0,r-3,0,7); ctx.stroke();\n    ctx.rotate(spin); ctx.strokeStyle='#c9752b'; ctx.lineWidth=2;\n    for(let i=0;i<5;i++){ const a=i/5*6.28; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(0,0); ctx.lineTo(Math.cos(a)*(r-5),Math.sin(a)*(r-5)); ctx.stroke(); }\n    ctx.fillStyle='#e79a44'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(0,0,3,0,7); ctx.fill();\n    ctx.restore();\n  }\n  drawSkeleton(ctx){\n    ctx.strokeStyle='#e8dcc4'; ctx.fillStyle='#e8dcc4'; ctx.lineWidth=2.4; ctx.lineCap='round'; ctx.lineJoin='round';\n    ctx.shadowColor='rgba(255,240,210,0.4)'; ctx.shadowBlur=4;\n    // spine\n    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(-6,-14); ctx.lineTo(-2,-34); ctx.stroke();\n    // ribs\n    for(let i=0;i<3;i++){ const yy=-18-i*5; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(-8,yy); ctx.lineTo(2,yy-1); ctx.stroke(); }\n    // skull\n    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(-1,-42,8,0,7); ctx.fill();\n    ctx.fillStyle='#20140a'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(-4,-43,1.8,0,7); ctx.arc(2,-43,1.8,0,7); ctx.fill();\n    ctx.fillStyle='#e8dcc4';\n    // arms to handlebar\n    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(-3,-30); ctx.lineTo(18,-18); ctx.lineTo(40,-8); ctx.stroke();\n    // legs to pegs\n    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(-6,-14); ctx.lineTo(4,-2); ctx.lineTo(14,8); ctx.stroke();\n    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(-6,-14); ctx.lineTo(-16,-2); ctx.lineTo(-24,10); ctx.stroke();\n    ctx.shadowBlur=0;\n  }\n  drawRagdoll(ctx,cam){\n    // the fallen bike where it landed\n    const b=this.bike;\n    ctx.save(); ctx.translate(b.x-cam.x, b.y-cam.y); ctx.rotate(b.a);\n    if(this.spr.moto && this.spr.wheelR && this.spr.wheelF){ this.drawWheels(ctx); this.drawMotoSprite(ctx); }\n    else this.drawBikeVector(ctx);\n    ctx.restore();\n    // ejected rider (\"tombé\" sprite): tumbles, then settles flat on the ground\n    const g=this.ragdoll;\n    const p = (this.perso()==='feminin' ? this.spr.downF : this.spr.downM);\n    ctx.save(); ctx.translate(g.x-cam.x, g.y-cam.y); ctx.rotate(g.a);\n    if(p){ const s=this.bikeScale()*(this.props.taillePilote ?? 1.16)*1.05; ctx.drawImage(p, -p.width*s*0.5, -p.height*s*0.66, p.width*s, p.height*s); }\n    else this.drawSkeleton(ctx);\n    ctx.restore();\n  }\n\n  finishFlag(ctx,cam){\n    const fx=this.finishX;\n    if(fx<cam.x-40 || fx>cam.x+this.W+40) return;\n    const gy=this.groundY(fx);\n    ctx.save(); this.worldT(ctx,cam,fx,gy);\n    ctx.strokeStyle='#e8dcc4'; ctx.lineWidth=4; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(0,0); ctx.lineTo(0,-120); ctx.stroke();\n    for(let r=0;r<5;r++) for(let cc=0;cc<3;cc++){ ctx.fillStyle=((r+cc)%2)?'#1a0d05':'#e8dcc4'; ctx.fillRect(2+cc*12,-118+r*11,12,11); }\n    ctx.fillStyle='#d9542e'; ctx.font=\"700 13px 'Oswald'\"; ctx.textAlign='left'; ctx.fillText('終 / FIN', 4, -6);\n    ctx.restore();\n  }\n\n  speedLines(ctx,W,H){\n    // very discreet: only at high speed, few lines, low opacity\n    if(this.state.screen!=='playing') return;\n    const sp=Math.hypot(this.bike.vx,this.bike.vy);\n    if(sp<520) return;\n    const a=Math.min(0.10,(sp-520)/4500);\n    ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(255,220,170,'+a+')'; ctx.lineWidth=1.5;\n    for(let i=0;i<3;i++){ const y=Math.random()*H; const len=50+Math.random()*90; const x=Math.random()*W; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x,y); ctx.lineTo(x-len,y); ctx.stroke(); }\n  }\n\n  renderVals(){\n    const st=this.state;\n    return {\n      containerRef: el=>{ if(el) this.root=el; },\n      grain: this.props.grain ?? true,\n      best: st.best,\n      isStart: st.screen==='start',\n      isPaused: st.screen==='paused',\n      isPlaying: st.screen==='playing',\n      gameTitle: this.perso()==='feminin' ? 'LOU' : 'JOE',\n      persoMBorder: this.perso()==='feminin' ? 'rgba(232,169,74,.35)' : '#d9542e',\n      persoMColor: this.perso()==='feminin' ? '#8f6f52' : '#ff9a5a',\n      persoFBorder: this.perso()==='feminin' ? '#d9542e' : 'rgba(232,169,74,.35)',\n      persoFColor: this.perso()==='feminin' ? '#ff9a5a' : '#8f6f52',\n      onPersoM: ()=>this.setPerso('masculin'),\n      onPersoF: ()=>this.setPerso('feminin'),\n      onPause: ()=>{ if(this.state.screen==='playing'){ this.input.gas=false; this.input.brake=false; this.setState({ screen:'paused' }); } },\n      onResume: ()=>{ if(this.state.screen==='paused') this.setState({ screen:'playing' }); },\n      onMenu: ()=>this.toMenu(),\n      isCrashed: st.screen==='crashed',\n      isGameOver: st.screen==='gameover',\n      isComplete: st.screen==='complete',\n      entryOpen: st.screen==='gameover' && st.qualifies && !st.saved,\n      showTable: st.screen==='gameover' && !(st.qualifies && !st.saved),\n      hasScores: st.top5.length>0,\n      top5: st.top5.map((e,i)=>({ rank:i+1, name:e.name, score:e.score })),\n      finalScore: st.finalScore,\n      banked: st.banked,\n      cs: st.cs, cf: st.cf,\n      kt: st.kt, kb: st.kb, ks: st.ks,\n      livesStr: '▲'.repeat(Math.max(0,st.lives)) + '△'.repeat(Math.max(0,3-st.lives)),\n      onNewGame: ()=>this.newGame(),\n      onRetry: ()=>this.retry(),\n      onNext: ()=>this.nextLevel(),\n      onSaveScore: ()=>this.saveScore(),\n      gasDown: (e)=>{ if(e&&e.preventDefault)e.preventDefault(); this.input.gas=true; }, gasUp: ()=>{ this.input.gas=false; },\n      brakeDown: (e)=>{ if(e&&e.preventDefault)e.preventDefault(); this.input.brake=true; }, brakeUp: ()=>{ this.input.brake=false; },\n      noCtx: (e)=>{ if(e&&e.preventDefault)e.preventDefault(); }\n    };\n  }\n}\n<\u002Fscript>\n\n\n\n<\u002Fbody><\u002Fhtml>"
  </script>
</body>
</html>
